TargetName: Complete final structural design — concrete structure 35 ft ceiling
Statement: Structural Sections & Details implements SOW-0012 (Complete final structural design)
Notes: FACT: SOW-0012 confirmed in decomposition §3 SSOW and §8 Scope Ledger

Statement: Structural Sections & Details supports OBJ-001 (code-compliant functional facility)
Notes: FACT: OBJ-001 confirmed in decomposition §5 Objectives

Statement: Structural Sections & Details supports OBJ-003 (complete P.Eng.-stamped IFC documentation)
Notes: FACT: OBJ-003 confirmed in decomposition §5 Objectives

Statement: County approval of DEL-002-01 required before final design commences (R-01 §3.3.2)
EvidenceQuote: County approval of Preliminary Structural Design... Required before final design commences
Notes: FACT: Explicit prerequisite. Hold-Point 2 in Procedure confirms this is a hard gate.

Statement: Geotech report required for foundation and service pit depth determination (R-01 §4.8.2)
EvidenceQuote: Geotechnical investigation report... Required for foundation and service pit depth
Notes: FACT: Explicit prerequisite. Guidance P-07 elaborates geotech parameters needed for below-grade details.

Statement: Preliminary site survey required for existing grade and site context
EvidenceQuote: Preliminary site survey... Required for existing grade and site context
Notes: FACT: Explicit prerequisite in Procedure table.

Statement: Section cut locations and member grid derive from framing plans; coordinate section cut schedule jointly
EvidenceQuote: Coordinate with... DEL-002-03 to establish section cut lines
Notes: FACT: Explicit interface. Hold-Point 1 requires signed section cut schedule before Phase 2.

Statement: Member sizes and reinforcing must be established before detailing; sections are the drawn expression of calculations
EvidenceQuote: Structural calculation package (in progress)... Member sizes... must be established before detailing
Notes: FACT: Explicit prerequisite/interface. Guidance P-01 reinforces: do not finalize sections before calculations complete.

Statement: Architectural floor plans required to confirm room locations, wall offsets, door opening positions, mezzanine extents
EvidenceQuote: Architectural floor plans (coordinated)... Required to confirm room locations
Notes: FACT: Explicit prerequisite in Procedure table. Marked ASSUMPTION in source regarding parallel development.

Statement: Crane supplier/manufacturer data required for crane runway beam size, rail type, and end stop requirements
EvidenceQuote: Crane supplier/manufacturer information... Required for crane runway beam size
Notes: FACT: Explicit prerequisite. Guidance T-04 proposes provisional design fallback if supplier data unavailable.

Statement: Owner/County confirmation of service pit design depth required to finalize pit structural section
EvidenceQuote: Owner/County confirmation of service pit depth... Required to finalize pit section
Notes: FACT: Explicit prerequisite. Pit depth not stated in RFP or App B (CON-002). Drives concrete volume and waterproofing scope.

Statement: Owner/County confirmation of mezzanine design live load required to finalize mezzanine structural design
EvidenceQuote: Owner/County confirmation of mezzanine design load... Required to finalize mezzanine structural design
Notes: FACT: Explicit prerequisite. RFP states functional description only — no numeric kPa/psf value (CON-001).

Statement: Structural sections must show top-of-foundation elevation and interface condition; explicit cross-reference to DEL-002-02 required
EvidenceQuote: interface condition between superstructure and foundation... explicitly cross-referenced to DEL-002-02
Notes: FACT: Specification R-015 and Guidance C-05 both require explicit interface cross-reference between DEL-002-04 and DEL-002-02.

Statement: Material designations on section drawings must be consistent with DEL-002-12 Structural Specification
EvidenceQuote: Cross-reference against DEL-002-12... to ensure material designations are consistent
Notes: FACT: Explicit coordination requirement in Procedure Step 4 and QC checklist item 3.

Statement: Mechanical penetration locations required for structural sleeve provisions in sections
Notes: FACT: Specification R-011 requires coordination. Procedure Step 15 defines specific interface scope: duct penetrations and HVAC equipment support.

Statement: Electrical conduit sleeve and penetration locations required for structural sleeve provisions
Notes: FACT: Specification R-011 requires coordination. Procedure Step 15 defines scope: conduit sleeves and crane power routing.

Statement: Plumbing penetration locations required for structural sleeve provisions in service pit and wash bay sections
Notes: FACT: Specification R-011 requires coordination. Procedure Step 15 defines scope: floor drains and sump penetrations in service pit and wash bay.

Statement: Architectural section interfaces required for wall section coordination and overhead door header clearance
EvidenceQuote: Distribute draft drawing set to Architectural (PKG-001)... wall section interfaces, overhead door header clearance
Notes: FACT: Procedure Step 15 defines specific review scope. Distinct from DEL-001-02 floor plan input (E06) — this covers architectural section coordination.
